# CalendarDays

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::CalendarDays;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        CalendarDays { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
date, month, year, event

## Categories
time

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/calendar-days)
